beat: Kriskin the Jester enters the Kingdome of Hearts
canonAdditions: Kriskin plays as the Jester: red-and-green harlequin motley, two-pointed belled cap, brass monocle-lens, book of tricks, juggles coins and dice, grinning

beat: Chose the Little Warm Door; entered the XP dreamworld with Blinkbug
Chose the Blue Screen; stood at the threshold of the unknown
Read the screen; learned the Blue is a wound fixable only at the castle; a bright thread home appeared

choice.label: CUSTOM
choice.name: Read the screen, seek the castle to fix the Blue

canonAdditions: The Blue Screen is a wound in the dream; it can only be mended at the castle where the dream is kept
A bright thread of light runs from the Blue Screen back across the XP hills to the castle

beat: Chose to Fold the World; the jester creases the map so castle and wound approach each other
canonAdditions: The Jester can fold the world's map like paper, bending distant places together along a glowing crease
